title: Corporate Responsibility - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
## Corporate Responsibility
Good corporate citizenship is a key component of our business plan. We recognize that our work can have a positive impact beyond our immediate stakeholders – the clients we are privileged to serve. In practice, this means sharing our legal knowledge with the wider community – not to make a profit, but to contribute our special skills and talents to the greater good.
- As a public service, our website and free online services provide the latest immigration news and information.
- Our firm is actively involved with the American Immigration Lawyers Association, frequently presenting papers at professional seminars.
- We also provide financial and other support to the American Immigration Council.
- Our lawyers teach and write about immigration law, and are persistent in their efforts to improve the law.
- We help people in distress, working pro bono publico to help foreign students, victimized by scams, and other immigrants struggling against wrongs that they may lack the means to fight.
- MurthyNAYAK Foundation seeks to help with children’s and women’s health and educational needs, to support programs that assist immigrants, educate and advocate for immigration, and support disaster relief efforts.
